allow: PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"demo@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}'; $token = $login.accessToken; Write-Host "Token OK"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/properties" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Properties status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/properties" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "No-token status: $\($r2.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"demo@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}' -SessionVariable session; Write-Host "Login OK, user: $\($login.user.name\)"; $refresh = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/refresh" -Method POST -WebSession $session; Write-Host "Refresh OK, new token: $\($refresh.accessToken.Substring\(0,20\)\)...")

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Testando login locador ===" ; $locador = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"demo@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}'; Write-Host "Locador: $\($locador.user.name\) | role: $\($locador.user.role\) | token: $\($locador.accessToken.Substring\(0,20\)\)..." ; Write-Host "" ; Write-Host "=== Testando login locatario ===" ; $locatario = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"ana@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}'; Write-Host "Locatario: $\($locatario.user.name\) | role: $\($locatario.user.role\) | tenantId: $\($locatario.user.tenantId\) | token: $\($locatario.accessToken.Substring\(0,20\)\)...")

PowerShell($locatario = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"ana@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}'; $t = $locatario.accessToken ; Write-Host "=== API Tenant ===" ; $property = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/property" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"} ; Write-Host "Imovel: $\($property.name\)" ; $contract = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/contract" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"} ; Write-Host "Contrato: $\($contract.id\) | aluguel: R$ $\($contract.rentAmount\)" ; $payments = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/payments" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"} ; Write-Host "Pagamentos: $\($payments.Count\) registros" ; $tickets = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/tickets" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"} ; Write-Host "Chamados: $\($tickets.Count\) registros")

PowerShell($locador = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"demo@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}' ; $tL = $locador.accessToken ; $notices = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/notices" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $tL"} ; Write-Host "Locador vê $\($notices.Count\) avisos:" ; $notices | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  [$\($_.category\)] $\($_.title\)" } ; Write-Host "" ; $ana = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"ana@equilino.app","password":"demo1234"}' ; $tA = $ana.accessToken ; $myNotices = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/notices" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $tA"} ; Write-Host "Ana vê $\($myNotices.Count\) avisos:" ; $myNotices | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  [$\($_.category\)] $\($_.title\) | lido: $\($_.read\)" })
